◎译　　名　白骨队：滑板最初的记忆
◎片　　名　BONES BRIGADE: An Autobiography
◎年　　代　2011

◎主　　演　托尼·霍克 Tony Hawk


◎简　　介  

　　Today skateboarding is omnipresent. Take a walk down any street in any town, and you are destined to see someone riding a skateboard. Well, it wasn’t always like that. In the early ’80s, skateboarding was fading away until Stacy Peralta brought a profoundly talented group of outsiders together and dubbed them the Bones Brigade. This documentary chronicles their epic rise, using...
